title: Extend window in Dropdown column like Excel
excerpt: When I use the dropdown column and I want to check duplicates, or typos with a long list of items the window does not extend very much. I would like to see something like Excel where we can extend the window to have a be…

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml: When I use the dropdown column and I want to check duplicates, or typos with a long list of items the window does not extend very much. I would like to see something like Excel where we can extend the window to have a better view.
